title: Don’t forget to have a plan! The market does actually have down days!
text: for those that don't remember the market for those that don't remember the market does move in two directions not just up does move in two directions not just up does move in two directions not just up today it's been a little bit of a down today it's been a little bit of a down today it's been a little bit of a down day good reminder of that but make sure day good reminder of that but make sure day good reminder of that but make sure you have a plan especially for all those you have a plan especially for all those you have a plan especially for all those short nasdaq folks like myself it's not short nasdaq folks like myself it's not short nasdaq folks like myself it's not gonna go down forever
